lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: Oh, hello. Have you got something you want preserving?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: Give it to me to look at then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: Well, you go kill things so I can stuff them, eh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: If you bring me a monster head or a very big fish, I can preserve it for you so you can mount it in your house.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I hear there are all sorts of exotic creatures in the Slayer Tower -- I'd like a chance to stuff one of them!

sections.title: Anything other than the items below

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: Don't be silly, I can't preserve that!

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: Killing a chicken is hardly worth boasting about!

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: That's a pretty ordinary fish, isn't it? Not really worth preserving.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You should have seen the one that got away!

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: That's a mighty fine sea bass you've caught there.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 1,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: There you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: All right, come back if you change your mind, eh?

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: Don't point that thing at me!

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 2,500 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: Goodness me! That thing's more of a weapon than a fish!

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 3,500 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: That's quite a fearsome shark! You've done everyone a service by removing it from the sea!

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 5,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 5,500 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 6,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 6,500 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: That's a very fine crawling hand.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 1,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: A cockatrice! Beautiful, isn't it? Look at the plumage!

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 2,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: My, he's a scary-looking fellow, isn't he? He'll look good on your wall!

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 4,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: A kurask? Splendid! Look at those horns!

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 6,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: Goodness, an abyssal demon!

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: See how it's still glowing? I'll have to use some magic to preserve that.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 12,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: Three?! This must be a King Black Dragon!

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I'll have to get out my heavy duty tools -- this skin's as tough as iron!

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 50,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: That must be the biggest kalphite I've ever seen!

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: Preserving insects is always tricky. I'll have to be careful...

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 50,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: That's not the most impressive head I've seen but I think I can just about manage this one.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: Preserving insects is always tricky. I'll have to be careful...

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 50,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: This blue dragon smells like it's been dead for a remarkably long time. Even by my standards, it smells awful.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 50,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: This hydra looks like it might fall to pieces soon. I'll have to be careful to preserve it properly.

lines.speaker: Taxidermist
lines.text: I can preserve that for you for 50,000 coins.
